latest.title: Francis Wrote A Book. Pre-Order It Now!
latest.desc:
As many of you know, Francis used to be a teacher… and that experience led him to write a book.

(Un)educated: My Life as a Teacher, and Why You Should Never Become One, is officially available for pre-order.

Pre-order link in the comments below ⬇️
